name: Egg Drop Soup#5
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak dried mushrooms.
2. Shred pork.
3. Combine cornstarch, sherry, and egg white; add to pork and toss to coat.
4. Sprinkle with sesame oil.
5. Shred bamboo shoots and soaked mushrooms.
6. Mince scallion stalk.
7. Blend cold stock and remaining cornstarch.
8. In a pan, combine remaining stock with mushrooms, bamboo shoots, soy sauce, and salt. Bring to a boil.
9. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 2 to 3 minutes.
10. Add cornstarch mixture and cook, stirring until soup begins to thicken.
11. Add pork and cook 1 minute more.
12. Meanwhile, beat eggs.
13. Pour eggs slowly into the pan, stirring constantly until they separate into shreds.
14. Turn off heat.
15. Sprinkle with minced scallions and pepper.
Variation: For the pork, substitute chicken.
